TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Tmunan, title = Tmunan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tmunan} }

S.FORM: Tmunan Itiniay i Xiulin Cen no Hualien ko Tmunan a niyaro', 217 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 758 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 93% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 707 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 7% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 51 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Truku83%, Amis3%, Tayal3%, Bunun1%, roma3%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: tmo~u~unan itiniaj i xio~u~uɾin ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u tmo~u~unan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tro~u~uko~u~u**%, amis*%, tajaɾ*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Tmunan Itiniay i Xiulin Cen no Hualien ko Tmunan a niyaro', 217 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 758 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 93% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 707 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 7% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 51 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Truku83%, Amis3%, Tayal3%, Bunun1%, roma3%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: tmo~u~unan itiniaj i xio~u~uɾin ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u tmo~u~unan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tro~u~uko~u~u**%, amis*%, tajaɾ*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
